opponents.name: Fisherman_John
opponents.meet_text: Hey there, I'm just doing some fishing. Want to battle?
opponents.rematch_text: Oh hey again, I don't mind another battle
opponents.first_win_text: I should have been paying more attention to my fishing...
opponents.rematch_win_text: Always happy to put my fishing aside for another one!
opponents.loss_text: I'm not just the best round here at fishing!

opponents.name: Bug_Catcher_Alex
opponents.meet_text: Some people hate bugs but I love them
opponents.rematch_text: You just love bugs as much as I do then?
opponents.first_win_text: Maybe bugs aren't as good as I thought...
opponents.rematch_win_text: Me and my bugs will win one of these days!
opponents.loss_text: I knew bugs were the best!!

opponents.name: Swimmer_Jordan
opponents.meet_text: I love the water, it's so calm and warm
opponents.rematch_text: I can always take a break for another match
opponents.rematch_win_text: Nothing like a good match and a long swim
opponents.loss_text: Maybe you should work on your swimming...
